rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 7/30/19. The following must be addressed prior to the motion being considered: 1. Proposed order has not been submitted on mandatory Judicial Council Form. A filed stamped copy of the motion should also be provided). 2. Judicial Council Form MC-052 is mandatory. 3. Filing fees have not been paid. 4. Proof of Service of the motion has not been filed.
